welcome_description:
{user}
Your connection has been verified.  
You are now within the Ecliptyx network — a silent, infrastructure‑driven collective operating beneath the digital night.

We specialize in [backend systems](https://discord.com/channels/1492884874040705024/1493027565475201226/1493027832270557275),  
[automation frameworks](https://discord.com/channels/1492884874040705024/1493027565475201226/1493028175427539084),  
and [real‑time server synchronization](https://discord.com/channels/1492884874040705024/1493027565475201226/1493028834914865293)  
designed to keep partnered communities stable, aligned, and unbroken.

Before you proceed, review our [Operational Directives](https://discord.com/channels/1492884874040705024/1493008830119022793/1493025733491298484).  
They ensure clarity, security, and continuity across the network.

If you require assistance, an authorized operator will respond when available.  
Until then, explore the channels, maintain system discipline, and move with intention.

-# Ecliptyx LLC — Unseen. Unbroken.
rules_text:
### ✦ ECLIPTYX LLC — OPERATIONAL DIRECTIVES

These directives govern all activity within the Ecliptyx network.  
We operate in eclipse: silent, precise, and aligned.

**[01] — [Network Conduct](ca://s?q=Explain_Network_Conduct)**
Maintain professionalism. Harassment, hostility, or disruptive behavior destabilizes the system and will be removed.

**[02] — [Data Integrity](ca://s?q=Explain_Data_Integrity)**
No sharing sensitive information, credentials, or private server data.  
Ecliptyx protects infrastructure, not personal leaks.

**[03] — [System Discipline](ca://s?q=Explain_System_Discipline)**
Keep channels organized. Post only in their intended sectors to preserve clarity and operational flow.

**[04] — [Tool Compliance](ca://s?q=Explain_Tool_Compliance)**
Use Ecliptyx tools responsibly. Misuse, exploitation, or attempts to bypass safeguards result in immediate restriction.

**[05] — [Non‑Interference](ca://s?q=Explain_Non_Interference)**
Ecliptyx does not participate in raids, attacks, or malicious activity.  
Any attempt to involve this network in such actions is prohibited.

**[06] — [Authorization Protocols](ca://s?q=Explain_Authorization_Protocols)**
Follow instructions from authorized personnel.  
Ecliptyx staff maintain system stability and their decisions are final.

**[07] — [External Transmission](ca://s?q=Explain_External_Transmission)**
No unsolicited advertising, invites, or external promotions without approval.

**[08] — [Account Security](ca://s?q=Explain_Account_Security)**
Secure your account. Compromised users will be isolated until verified safe.

> By remaining in this server, you acknowledge and accept these directives.  
> Ecliptyx LLC — Unseen. Unbroken.
